message.title: New Smash Bros. Ultimate content!
message.content: A tutorial video has been added in the Smash Ultimate mechanics section, go see it now!

message.title: Alex, the newest addition to Street Fighter 6!
message.content: Alex has been added to our list of characters in the Street Fighter 6 page, check it out!

message.title: Chat now exportable!
message.content: Fight-Hub's chat is now open for users to export and see in different formats (like xml), chat now and try it out!
